title: Basic Instructional Program: Required Instruction (Secondary)
description: Conroe ISD's requirements for secondary school courses outline which subjects students in middle and high school must take to meet state and district graduation standards. It covers core areas like English, math, science, and social studies, along with other required coursework that prepares students for college, careers, and life after graduation. Parents and students can use this information to understand what classes are expected at each grade level and how those requirements shape a student's path through secondary school.
